sources.citation: Vijay-Kumar S, Bugg CE, Cook WJ. Structure of ubiquitin refined at 1.8 A resolution. J Mol Biol. 1987.

sources.preprocessing: The first 76-residue ubiquitin repeat was extracted; no residues were inferred.
